hausa.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Koma zuwa jerin kayan aikin STEM Lab
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.how_sharp_or_flat_you_are_aim_for_the_: Yadda kake da tsayi ko ƙasa. Ka nufi koren yanki na tsakiya (±10 cents).
hausa.your_pitch_over_time_mapped_to_musical: Tsayin muryarka a kan lokaci, an tsara shi zuwa sautunan kiɗa. Kore = daidai, rawaya = kusa, ja = ɓataccen sauti.
hausa.piano_roll_showing_pitch_history_green: Piano roll da ke nuna tarihin tsayin murya. Layin kore yana nuna waƙa daidai (cikin 10 cents), rawaya kusa (cikin 25 cents), ja ɓataccen sauti (fiye da 25 cents).
hausa.click_a_note_to_hear_the_tone_try_to_m: Danna sauti don ji shi. Ka yi ƙoƙarin daidaita shi da muryarka!
hausa.a_tone_plays_match_it_with_your_voice_: Sauti yana kunna — ka daidaita shi da muryarka! Riƙe tsayin murya daidai na daƙiƙa ɗaya. Maki ya dogara ne akan gudu.
hausa.sing_this_note_and_hold_it_within_10_c: Waƙa wannan sauti kuma ka riƙe shi cikin 10 cents na daƙiƙa ɗaya
hausa.this_will_guide_you_through_finding_yo: Wannan zai jagorance ka wajen nemo sautukanka mafi ƙasa da mafi tsayi masu daɗi. Tabbatar makirufo yana aiki.
hausa.sing_your_lowest_comfortable_note: Waƙa sautinka mafi ƙasa mai daɗi
hausa.hold_the_note_steady_for_about_1_secon: Riƙe sauti a tsaye kusan daƙiƙa ɗaya.
hausa.cancel_vocal_range_test_low_range: Soke gwajin yankin murya (yanki mai ƙasa)
hausa.now_sing_your_highest_comfortable_note: Yanzu waƙa sautinka mafi tsayi mai daɗi
hausa.cancel_vocal_range_test_high_range: Soke gwajin yankin murya (yanki mai tsayi)
hausa.estimated_from_your_lowest_note_true_v: An ƙiyasta daga sautinka mafi ƙasa — ainihin nau'in murya ya dogara kuma akan yanki mai daɗi (tessitura) da launin murya, ba kawai akan yanki ba.
hausa.piano_keyboard_showing_vocal_range_use: Madannan piano da ke nuna yankin murya. Yi amfani da maɓallan kibiya na hagu/dama don zagayawa tsakanin sautuka, Enter ko Space don kunnawa.
hausa.very_little_pitch_variation_good_for_c: Ƙaramin bambancin tsayin murya sosai. Mai kyau don haɗakar mawaƙa!
hausa.vibrato_rate_is_above_8_hz_try_to_rela: Adadin vibrato ya wuce 8 Hz. Ka yi ƙoƙarin hutawa da rage gudu.
hausa.vibrato_rate_is_below_4_hz_try_to_ener: Adadin vibrato ya ƙasa da 4 Hz. Ka yi ƙoƙarin ƙarfafa gudanar iskarka.
hausa.vibrato_width_exceeds_100_cents_try_fo: Faɗin vibrato ya wuce 100 cents. Ka nufi girgiza mai ƙunci.
hausa.beautiful_rate_and_depth_are_in_the_id: Kyakkyawa! Adadi da zurfi suna cikin yanki mafi kyau.
hausa.getting_there_aim_for_5_7_hz_rate_and_: Kusan isa! Ka nufi adadin 5-7 Hz da zurfin 30-80 cents.
hausa.sustain_a_note_with_no_vibrato_practic: Riƙe sauti ba tare da vibrato ba. Ka yi atisayen sarrafa muryarka don riƙe shi tsayayye gaba ɗaya.
hausa.sustain_a_note_and_let_your_natural_vi: Riƙe sauti kuma ka bar vibrato ɗinka na halitta ya bayyana. Kada ka tilasta shi — ka huta ka bar ya faru.
hausa.try_to_vibrate_at_exactly_6_hz_6_oscil: Ka yi ƙoƙarin girgiza a daidai 6 Hz (girgiza 6 a daƙiƙa). Duba karatun adadi.
hausa.try_to_keep_vibrato_depth_around_50_ce: Ka yi ƙoƙarin riƙe zurfin vibrato kusan 50 cents. Ba faɗi sosai ba, ba ƙunci sosai ba.
hausa.sustain_a_note_to_see_your_vibrato_pat: Riƙe sauti don ganin tsarin vibrato ɗinka. Layin tsakiya shine matsakaicin tsayin muryarka.
hausa.vibrato_waveform_trace_showing_pitch_d: Alamar sifar igiyar vibrato da ke nuna karkacewar tsayin murya a kan lokaci
hausa.staff_notation_showing_reference_targe: Rubutun layin kiɗa da ke nuna tunani, manufa, da sautinka na yanzu
hausa.explore_how_your_body_makes_sound_clic: Bincika yadda jikinka yake yin sauti. Danna yanki don koya game da shi, ko gudanar da rayarwa don ganin yana aiki.
hausa.sagittal_cross_section_diagram_of_the_: Zanen yanki na sagittal na hanyar murya ta ɗan adam. Yi amfani da maɓallan kibiya na hagu/dama don motsawa tsakanin yankuna, Enter ko Space don zaɓi.
hausa.understanding_these_conditions_helps_y: Fahimtar waɗannan yanayi yana taimaka maka gane alamun gargaɗi da wuri. Idan kana da alamun da suke ci gaba, ka ga likita.
hausa.this_information_is_educational_only_i: 👨‍⚕️ Wannan bayani na ilimi ne kawai. Ba shawarar likita ba ce. Idan kana da damuwa game da muryarka, ka ga likitan kunne-hanci-maƙogwaro ko masanin magana.
hausa.get_personalized_vocal_health_tips_app: Sami shawarwarin lafiyar murya na keɓaɓɓe da suka dace da matakin ajinka.
hausa.breathe_deep_into_your_belly_diaphragm: Ka ja numfashi mai zurfi zuwa cikin cikinka (diaphragm), ba zuwa ƙirji ba.
hausa.keep_your_core_engaged_to_control_airf: Ka riƙe tsokokinka na tsakiya suna aiki don sarrafa gudanar iska yayin waƙa.
hausa.let_the_air_flow_smoothly_and_evenly_t: Ka bar iska ta gudana cikin sauƙi da daidaito ta cikin igiyoyin muryarka.
hausa.feet_shoulder_width_apart_weight_balan: Ƙafafu a faɗin kafaɗa, nauyi yana daidaita daidai
hausa.shoulders_relaxed_and_rolled_back_not_: Kafaɗu sun kwanta suna komawa baya (ba a lanƙwashe ba)
hausa.chin_level_not_tilted_up_or_down: Haɓa a daidai — ba a karkata sama ko ƙasa ba
hausa.jaw_relaxed_and_slightly_dropped_when_: Muƙamuƙi ya kwanta ya sauka kaɗan yayin waƙa
hausa.avoid_locking_knees_tensing_neck_or_cl: Ka guji: kulle gwiwoyi, tsaurara wuya, ko danne muƙamuƙi
hausa.read_the_notes_on_the_staff_and_sing_t: Karanta sautuka a kan layin kiɗa kuma ka waƙe su cikin tsari. Gano tsayin murya na ainihin lokaci yana bincika daidaiton ka.
hausa.singing_and_vocal_lab: Dakin Gwaje-gwaje na Waƙa da Murya
hausa.pitch_training_vocal_range_vibrato_int: Horar da tsayin murya, yankin murya, vibrato, da waƙar tazara
hausa.sing_into_the_mic_the_lab_tracks_frequ: Waƙa cikin makirufo; dakin gwaje-gwaje yana bin diddigin mita a ainihin lokaci. Mawaƙa masu horo suna riƙe tsayin murya cikin ±5 cents (1/20 na rabin-sauti) — haka daidaiton sauti cikakke yake ji.
hausa.most_untrained_voices_span_1_5_2_octav: Yawancin muryoyin da ba a horar da su ba suna faɗaɗa octave 1.5-2; mawaƙa na gargajiya masu horo suna kaiwa 3 ko fiye. Faɗaɗa yanki galibi game da haɗa rejista ne, ba kawai miƙawa sama da ƙasa ba.
hausa.healthy_vibrato_5_7_hz_oscillation_60_: Vibrato mai ƙoshin lafiya: girgiza 5-7 Hz, da faɗin ~60-100 cents. A hankali = girgiza; da sauri = rawa. Vibrato sakamakon tallafin numfashi mai kwanciya ne, ba dabara ta daban ba.
hausa.interval_singer_ear_training: Mai Waƙar Tazara — Horar da Kunne
hausa.major_3rd_vs_minor_3rd_is_the_single_m: Na uku babba da na uku ƙarama shine mafi rikitarwa nau'i-biyu na tazara ga masu farawa. Alamun tunawa: na uku babba = "Oh when the saints", na uku ƙarama = "Greensleeves". Yana gina jin gaɓɓai.
hausa.lip_trills_sirens_before_any_sustained: Girgizar leɓe + ƙara kafin kowace waƙa mai tsayi. Mintuna 5-10 na dumama mai ƙarancin ƙarfi yana rage haɗarin yawan amfani da igiyoyin murya da rabi. Tsallake dumama shine dalili na 1 na raunukan murya da za a iya hanawa.
hausa.solf_ge_do_re_mi_letter_names_for_sigh: Solfège (do-re-mi) ya fi sunayen haruffa kyau don karanta rubutu saboda gaɓoɓi suna ɓoye alaƙar tazara, ba kawai lambobin tsayin murya ba. Do mai motsi ya fi do tsayayye kyau don kiɗan toni.
hausa.resonance_lab_discover_your_vocal_tone: Dakin Gwaje-gwaje na Amsawa — Gano Launin Muryarka
hausa.two_sliders_throat_openness_and_soft_p: Zame biyu — buɗewar maƙogwaro da ɗaga rufin baki mai laushi — suna haɗuwa zuwa halaye huɗu na launin murya (mai wadata, mai haske, mai ɗumi, na hanci). Babu maki, babu bayyanawa: gwada, rubuta, kuma ka bayyana abin da ka gano.
hausa.operatic_professional_tone_full_resona: Launin murya na opera / ƙwararru. Cikakkiyar amsawa.
hausa.mellow_tone_choral_acoustic: Launin murya mai laushi. Mawaƙa / akustik.
hausa.tight_resonance_often_unintended: Amsawa mai tsauri. Galibi ba da gangan ba.
hausa.sliders_for_throat_openness_soft_palat: Zame don buɗewar maƙogwaro, ɗaga rufin baki mai laushi. Rarrabuwa daban da launukan murya 4. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.hypothesis_what_anatomical_adjustments: Zato: Wane gyare-gyaren jiki ne ke haifar da launin murya mai wadata?
hausa.why_do_classical_singers_lift_the_pala: Me yasa mawaƙan gargajiya ke ɗaga rufin baki?
hausa.how_does_throat_openness_affect_overto: Yaya buɗewar maƙogwaro ke shafar jerin sautunan sama?
hausa.explain_how_resonance_cavity_shape_con: Bayyana yadda sifar ramin amsawa ke sarrafa launin murya.
hausa.design_note_discrete_4_tone_marker_no_: Bayanin ƙira: alamar launin murya 4 daban; babu makin akustik; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
